n.description: Sample size for the smoking and lung cancer example, used to determine degrees of freedom (n-2) for the t critical value.

b.description: Estimated regression slope coefficient, the point estimate around which the confidence interval is constructed. Note: the background states 0.02284 but the answer uses 0.02884.

s_Y|X.description: Standard error of the estimate (residual standard deviation), used in computing the standard error of the slope.

s_X.description: Standard deviation of the independent variable X, used in computing the standard error of the slope.
